mapper.select: SELECT s.LOGO_IMG AS logoImg, s.STORE_NAME AS storeName, s.STORE_DETAIL AS storeDetail, m.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, m.MEMBER_EMAIL AS memberEmail, m.MEMBER_PHONE AS memberPhone, se.ACCOUNT_BANK AS accountBank, se.ACCOUNT AS account FROM STORE s JOIN SELLER se ON s.SELLER_ID = se.SELLER_ID JOIN MEMBER m ON se.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE s.STORE_URL = #{storeUrl}
